caption:
Your Instagram is not a website. Here's why that matters.

75% of people judge your credibility by your website — before they ever contact you.

When someone Googles your business name, Instagram doesn't rank the same way. And if Meta changes the algorithm? Your reach disappears overnight.

A website is yours. Your address, your rules, your leads.

From Rs 8,000 at bienzoli.com

#WebsiteTips #SmallBusinessMauritius #DigitalPresence #bienzoli #OnlineBusiness

templateData.headline: Your Instagram is not a website.
templateData.body: 75% of people judge credibility by your website. Google can't rank Instagram like a site. You don't own your social page — algorithm changes can kill your reach overnight. A website is yours, forever.
